signals.headline: **Iran-US/Israel ceasefire**: Fragile 2-week deal (starting ~April 8, expiring April 22); talks collapsed April 12 over
signals.raw: **Iran-US/Israel ceasefire**: Fragile 2-week deal (starting ~April 8, expiring April 22); talks collapsed April 12 over nuclear issues; Strait of Hormuz remains disrupted; Kremlin welcomed it initially.[2][3][4][5]
